link_rule: Application links must be copied only from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.
llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Descriptions are short previews. Fetch detail_path only for shortlisted roles. Copy job URLs exactly from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Supplier Quality Engineer
jobs.description_preview: About The Role Ensure all QM rules in accordance with ISO9001 / IATF16949 / ISO14001 / ISO 45001 / VDA / AIAG procedures Address and resolve quality issues, providing technical input and guidance on process enhancements and improvements at suppliers Drive pro-active QM mindset in BU How You Will Do It Cooperate with...
